calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-27-2014 Continued To Mar-10-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Emilie Calhoun for and with Kathryn Smolen (Petitioner). Julia Wald for and with Katrina Smolen. Avid Alavi for Elizabeth Adler.

Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions with regard to the issues of venue, the Decedent's domicile (Marin County verus San Francisco), whether the prenuptial agreement gives up Kathryn Smolen's priorty to be appointed as Administrator, whether the Marin County matter will go forward, whether there are dificencies in the Marin County matter, whether or not a Neutral Fiduciary should be appointed, etc. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary was continued to March 10, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for status on the outcome of the Marin County matter and for Counsel to file furhter briefs/authorities on the issue of venue and priority in both matters. The supplemental briefs are to be filed by February 15, 2014. Replies are due one week later.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
